ManaCost:R
Types:Legendary Creature Monkey Pirate

K:Dash:1 R
T:Mode$ DamageDone | ValidSource$ Card.Self | ValidTarget$ Player | CombatDamage$ True | Execute$ TrigExileAndTreasure | TriggerDescription$ Whenever CARDNAME deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token and exile the top card of that player's library. Until end of turn, you may cast that card.
Oracle:Whenever Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token and exile the top card of that player's library. Until end of turn, you may cast that card.\nDash {1}{R}
